finding: Annotation contract adopted; mirrors wal.sh spec with :EXEC_VERDICT: extension and markdown HTML-comment shim.

OTel :4318, Prometheus :9090, Grafana :3000, ollama :11434, skills-hub :8400 all confirmed.
FIFO path /tmp/sage-sse-<pid> verified in src/sage/mcp.scm.
src/sage/telemetry.scm catches all failures via catch #t + log-warn; never blocks REPL.
spec requires mutual exclusion of result/error; code checks both but does not validate exclusion (mcp.scm:636-645).
spec says unknown content types MUST be preserved; mcp.scm:648-653 only extracts text blocks, drops image/resource/unknown.
fresh FIFO+curl per call confirmed in mcp.scm:548-603.
mcp-do-initialize called first in both connect and per-call paths (mcp.scm:392,560).
protocolVersion 2024-11-05 + capabilities + clientInfo present (mcp.scm:431-434).

line numbers stale (L1082/L1098 dont exist; actual ~1294/~1460).

user/project scope layer not implemented; hook-register has no scope param (hooks.scm:53).
shell hooks not implemented; no shell executor in hooks.scm.
no sandbox implementation; Scheme hooks run as plain lambdas (hooks.scm header comment line 9).

hook-fire-post-tool called after tool execute, before return (tools.scm:415-416).
hook handler exceptions caught + WARN-logged + swallowed (hooks.scm:114-121).
hook registration order preserved via append-to-end (hooks.scm:59-62); FIFO confirmed by test.
All 19 claims are forward-looking specs; src/sage/skills.scm NOT YET IMPLEMENTED (per bead guile-sage-6fx).
heading says 'four scopes'; section table + IMPL-SPEC lists 6 (enterprise/personal/project/plugin/universal/claude-compat).
CONTRACT says timeout cap but doesnt specify value; IMPL-SPEC says 10s — CONTRACT should cite the value.
table lists 6 metrics; *metric-units* in telemetry.scm:79-84 defines units for only 5; mcp.tool_call defaults to '1' via catch-all.

:4317 -> :4318 substitution + /v1/metrics suffix confirmed (telemetry.scm:115); test-telemetry.scm:158.
*scope-name* hardcoded 'com.dsp-dr.guile_sage' (telemetry.scm:74).
telemetry-flush! wrapped in catch #t; exceptions log-warn then swallowed (telemetry.scm:322-357).

telemetry.scm constructs no Authorization headers; claim references dashboard-mutation script, out-of-scope for module.

scripts/timing-bench.sh implements full protocol. TIMING_BENCH_MODELS default verbatim match. Native tool_calls check (line 114-115) excludes text-formatted. Locked 2026-04-11 measurements drive model-tier defaults.
Companion annotations file per ANNOTATION-SYSTEMS.org §3 schema covering all docs not carrying inline drawers (release notes, ADRs, RFCs, reports, operational + contract docs, top-level repo docs).
